name: agentify-openapi
description: Turn any OpenAPI/Swagger spec into an agent-ready MCP server. Point it at a spec and every operation becomes a tool an agent can call.

openapi_spec_url.title: OpenAPI Spec URL
openapi_spec_url.description: URL of the OpenAPI/Swagger spec (3.x or 2.0, JSON or YAML). Every operation in the spec becomes an MCP tool.

bearer_token.title: Bearer Token (optional)
bearer_token.description: Sent to the upstream API as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. Leave blank if the API is public.

api_key.title: API Key (optional)
api_key.description: Sent to the upstream API as an API key header (name auto-discovered from the spec, default X-API-Key). Leave blank if not needed.
